overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring neon-lit outdoor dining areas, futuristic architecture, and a glowing food truck. The footage is from a video game with heavy rain, dominant teal and pink neon lighting, and wet reflective surfaces throughout.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk plaza at night, with the camera walking forward through an outdoor dining area. Neon signs glow on distant buildings while purple-lit umbrellas shelter empty tables. An NPC in a trench coat stands to the right looking at a phone as the camera passes.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden deck dining area with vertical gardens

approaching the large futuristic food truck with bright cyan neon trim

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza, passing NPCs seated at tables on the wooden deck area

notable_agents.action: sitting at a table drinking from a bottle
group of NPCs conversing near the tree

entered.detail: wet wooden plank flooring reflecting cyan neon lights
large boxy vehicle with bright cyan neon trim and metal security grating
horizontal cyan LED strips mounted on black poles
vertical garden wall with dense green vegetation and vines

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a wooden deck area with dense ivy walls and horizontal neon light strips. The ground changes from pavement to wet wooden planks. A large futuristic food truck with bright cyan neon becomes the focal point ahead, while NPCs sit at tables drinking and conversing near a central tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with digital signage

events.description: moving under building overhang, reduced rain exposure and darker shadows
approaching storefront with illuminated digital billboard and vending area

agents.ego_description: walking past the food truck toward the building entrance with digital signage

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing a face with promotional text
glass doorway with glowing interior and metal frame
large industrial waste bin with yellow lid and hazard markings
lit storefront with neon signage and glass display

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a building overhang into a more enclosed area, leaving the wooden deck behind. The food truck passes to the left as the camera approaches a building entrance with a large digital billboard. The area becomes sheltered from the rain, with concrete pavement and a vending machine visible near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk plaza that transitions from an open outdoor dining area into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins by moving past purple-lit umbrellas and a lone figure in a trench coat, with neon signs glowing through the heavy rain. As the camera advances, the pavement shifts to wet wooden planks on a deck bordered by ivy walls and neon strips, leading toward a bright cyan food truck where NPCs gather around a central tree. The scene then shifts as the camera moves under a building overhang, leaving the wooden deck and the food truck behind to enter a dry, concrete area. Finally, the movement concludes at a building entrance, passing a vending machine and a large digital billboard as the rain fades from view.
